The best coffee makers in 2026, tested and reviewed
Spring 2026 coffee maker buying guide: drip, single-serve, and specialty picks

en.commentary:
Stepping into mid-May, my conviction on the Moccamaster KBGV Select grows stronger. Two weeks of daily brewing across three different bean origins confirms what the SCA Gold Cup certification promises: this machine lands water between 196 and 205 degrees on every cycle, and the resulting cup has a clarity that you can taste immediately. The five-year warranty and Dutch handcrafted copper boiler back up the $369 price tag with engineering substance. I am scoring it 9.2 this week because the consistency over time is the real story here.

Breville's Precision Brewer Thermal moves up to 9.0 on my chart, and that bump reflects how often I reach for it when I want flexibility. The six brew modes plus PID temperature control to one degree Fahrenheit deliver Gold Cup quality whenever you select that profile, and you can still pivot to a cold brew run or a strong setting for espresso-style drinkers. At its current discounted street price around $200, this is the smartest single buy for most households in May 2026.

Fellow Aiden holds third because the single-serve mode plus programmable temperature to one degree Celsius justifies the $400 sticker for specialty coffee drinkers who already weigh beans on a 0.1 gram scale. Bruvi BV-01 stays my top single-serve recommendation. The biodegradable B-Pods deliver a body and crema profile that genuinely outclasses K-Cups and Nespresso, and the new spring 2026 pod lineup includes two excellent single origin options. Cuisinart DCC-4000 climbs slightly to 8.3 on value momentum, and it remains the right pick when reliable hot drip coffee under $120 is the whole job. The budget Ninja and Hamilton Beach machines round out the rankings as honest tools for households that want a basic carafe each morning.

highlights.title: Moccamaster's Temperature Consistency Earns The Top Spot Again
highlights.body: After daily logging of brew temperatures with a thermometer in the showerhead spray, the KBGV Select hits the SCA optimal window on 100 percent of cycles. That kind of repeatability is what separates a $369 specialty machine from a $99 drip pot, and it is why my score lifted to 9.2 this week.

highlights.title: Breville Precision Brewer Is The Smart Buy For Most Homes
highlights.body: At a current sale price hovering near $200, the BDC450 gives you certified Gold Cup brewing plus six modes including pour-over simulation and cold brew. For households that want one machine to handle every coffee scenario, this is the highest leverage purchase in 2026.

highlights.title: Bruvi Continues To Lead The Single-Serve Category
highlights.body: The B-Pod system delivers visibly richer crema and noticeably more body than competing capsule machines. Two consecutive years as CNN Underscored's best single-serve pick reflects what my own taste tests confirm: this is the pod machine to buy in 2026.

highlights.title: Cuisinart DCC-4000 Rises As The Sub-$120 Champion
highlights.body: Consumer Reports' top-rated drip machine under $120 keeps proving its value. The 24-hour programmability paired with consistently hot brew performance makes it my recommendation for anyone who wants reliable daily coffee without a premium investment.

zh-tw.commentary:
進入五月中旬，我對 Moccamaster KBGV Select 的信心又更深一層。老實說，連續兩週用三款不同產區豆子實測下來，水溫穩穩落在攝氏 91 到 96 度的精品萃取黃金區間，杯中風味的乾淨度立刻喝得出來。

SCA 金杯認證加上荷蘭手工銅製鍋爐，五年保固的底氣是有工程實力撐著的。NT$12,490 的價格我這週把它打到 9.2 分，重點就在於這台機器長期使用的穩定度真的沒話說。

Breville Precision Brewer Thermal 這週我給到 9.0 分。講真的，這台是我家裡最常拿來用的機器，六種沖煮模式加上 PID 一度華氏精準溫控，選金杯模式就是金杯水準，要切冷萃或加強萃取也都做得到。現在折扣價落在台幣六千五左右，2026 年五月想一機抵全家用，這台是性價比最強的選擇。

Fellow Aiden 守在第三名，攝氏一度精準調控加上單杯沖煮模式，NT$13,000 上下對會用 0.1 克秤量豆的精品咖啡玩家來說很合理。Bruvi BV-01 還是我心目中膠囊機冠軍，B-Pod 的口感層次和油脂明顯比 K-Cup 和 Nespresso 強一截，春季新推出的兩款單一產區豆值得追蹤。

Cuisinart DCC-4000 這週微升到 8.3，平價滴濾段位它依然是 Consumer Reports 認可的標竿。Ninja CE251 和 Hamilton Beach 49465R 屬於老實做事的入門選擇，給每天只要一壺熱咖啡的家庭。

highlights.title: Moccamaster 的溫度穩定度再次站穩冠軍寶座
highlights.body: 我用熱電偶溫度計每天記錄沖煮頭出水溫度，KBGV Select 百分之百落在 SCA 黃金萃取區間。這種重現度就是 NT$12,490 機器和 NT$3,000 平價滴濾機的差距，本週分數升到 9.2 就是這個道理。

highlights.title: Breville Precision Brewer 是大多數家庭最聰明的選擇
highlights.body: 目前折扣價落在台幣六千多，BDC450 給你金杯認證沖煮加上六種模式，包含手沖模擬與冷萃。家裡只想擺一台機器處理各種咖啡場景的話，2026 年這台投資報酬率最高。

highlights.title: Bruvi 持續穩坐單杯膠囊機王座
highlights.body: B-Pod 系統的油脂厚度和咖啡體感明顯比其他膠囊機強，CNN Underscored 連兩年選它當最佳單杯膠囊機。我自己盲測結果也一致，2026 年要買膠囊機就選這台。

highlights.title: Cuisinart DCC-4000 在三千五以下價位重新站上頂點
highlights.body: Consumer Reports 評選台幣三千五以下最高分滴濾機，這台名實相符。24 小時預約搭配穩定高溫萃取，想要日常喝得到一杯熱咖啡又不想花大錢，這台就是答案。

en.commentary:
The coffee maker market in 2026 has two clear poles, and knowing which one you belong to makes this decision simple. The Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select earns the top spot because it does one thing with absolute precision: it brews at 196–205°F, the exact window that the Specialty Coffee Association identifies as optimal for extraction. SCA Gold Cup certification is not a marketing label — it means independent scientists have validated that this machine hits the target every single time. The five-year warranty and Dutch handcrafted construction back up the $369 price better than any reviewer can.

Breville's Precision Brewer Thermal lands second because it pairs exceptional brew quality with six distinct modes — Gold Cup, pour-over simulation, cold brew, strong, and two custom settings — all at $240. For most households, the Breville is the smarter actual purchase. The Moccamaster is a one-trick specialist that it executes brilliantly; the Breville gives you that same Gold Cup performance plus real versatility.

Fellow Aiden sits at third with a justified reputation. The $400 price demands a specialty coffee lifestyle to make sense, but for drinkers who select beans by farm and brew method, programmable water temperature to 1°C is transformative. Fellow loses ground on value against the Breville, not on quality.

Bruvi BV-01 takes the single-serve crown decisively. CNN Underscored named it best single-serve in both 2025 and 2026, and my testing confirms the verdict — the biodegradable B-Pods produce noticeably better coffee than any K-Cup or Nespresso pod. Cuisinart DCC-4000 stands as the value winner: Consumer Reports' highest-rated drip machine under $120 makes a compelling case for everyone who wants reliable daily coffee without a premium investment. Ninja CE251 and Hamilton Beach 49465R serve their budget segments well, though their brew temperature consistency cannot match the machines ranked above them.

highlights.title: The Moccamaster Earns Its Price Through Certified Precision
highlights.body: At $369, the Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select is not cheap. What it delivers is SCA Gold Cup Standard certification — independent verification that the water temperature stays between 196 and 205°F throughout the entire brew cycle. That temperature window is the difference between coffee that tastes bright and complex and coffee that tastes flat or bitter. The copper heating element and five-year warranty are the mechanical evidence behind that claim. For anyone drinking two or more cups per day with quality beans, the math works over a three-year horizon against any café habit.

highlights.title: The Breville Precision Brewer Is the Smarter Purchase for Most Households
highlights.body: I rank the Breville Precision Brewer Thermal second overall, and for a large share of buyers it is the machine I would recommend first. Six brewing modes — including a Gold Cup setting that meets the same SCA standard as the Moccamaster — plus cold brew, pour-over simulation, and strong modes make it genuinely versatile. The PID temperature controller holds accuracy to ±1°F. All of this arrives at $240. For a household that wants both daily convenience and occasional brewing experimentation, the Breville earns its position.

highlights.title: Bruvi BV-01 Solves the Pod Machine Quality Problem
highlights.body: Single-serve machines dominate morning routines in millions of households, and until Bruvi, the trade-off was always convenience over quality. The BV-01 changes that equation. CNN Underscored awarded it best single-serve for two consecutive years, and the reason is straightforward: biodegradable B-Pods combined with Bruvi's proprietary brewing algorithm deliver a cup that I consistently rate higher than anything Keurig or Nespresso produces. The $349 price is a premium over standard pod machines, but it is the correct machine for anyone who wants pod convenience without accepting pod coffee quality.

highlights.title: Cuisinart DCC-4000 Sets the Bar for Value Under $120
highlights.body: Consumer Reports assigned the Cuisinart DCC-4000 its highest drip coffee maker rating in 2026, and the testing methodology there is rigorous. Brew performance, convenience, carafe handling, and cleaning are all scored independently. The DCC-4000 reaches the top on a combined basis at a price that stays below $120. The 24-hour programmable timer and auto-shutoff make it practical for households that need coffee ready before anyone is fully awake. For the majority of buyers who want consistent daily coffee at a fair price, this is the right answer.

highlights.title: Fellow Aiden Is the Right Machine for the Specialty Coffee Lifestyle
highlights.body: Fellow built Aiden for a specific customer: someone who selects beans by origin and roast date, reads water temperature as a brewing variable, and cares that their machine can reproduce a recipe precisely. Programmable water temperature to within 1°C, scheduling, and batch-plus-single-serve flexibility in a thermal carafe machine at $400 — this is a legitimate home café setup. The Fellow loses points on value because the Breville Precision Brewer achieves near-equivalent brew quality for $160 less. But for the enthusiast for whom temperature control is the whole point, the Aiden is the correct tool.

zh-tw.commentary:
2026 年的咖啡機市場有兩個清楚的選購邏輯，搞清楚自己屬於哪一種，這個決定就簡單了。

Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select 排第一，理由很直接：它把沖煮水溫精準控制在 SCA 精品咖啡協會認定的最佳萃取區間，也就是攝氏 92 到 96 度，每一壺都不偏差。SCA 金杯認證不是品牌說了算的行銷術語，是獨立機構實測驗證的結果。荷蘭手工製造加上五年保固，把 NT$12,490 這個價格支撐得很穩。

Breville Precision Brewer Thermal 排第二，而且對大多數家庭來說，我更想推薦它。$240 美元的價格買到六種沖煮模式，包含達到同樣 SCA 金杯標準的設定、手沖模擬、冷萃和濃縮模式，PID 溫控精度正負 1°F。Moccamaster 是在單一任務上做到極致的專家；Breville 給你同樣的金杯表現，還多了真實的彈性。

Fellow Aiden 排第三，有自己的支持者。NT$13,000 的代購價格需要精品咖啡的生活方式才撐得住，但對那些會用產地和烘焙日期選豆的人，可以精確設定攝氏 1 度水溫差異的沖煮機器，體驗差異是真實的。Fellow 輸給 Breville 的是性價比，不是品質。

Bruvi BV-01 是單杯機的第一名，沒有懸念。CNN Underscored 連續兩年把最佳單杯機給它，原因很簡單：它用可生物分解的 B-Pod 膠囊配合專屬沖煮演算法，沖出來的咖啡比市面上任何 K-Cup 或 Nespresso 都好喝。

Cuisinart DCC-4000 是 2026 年性價比的答案，Consumer Reports 最高評分的百元滴濾機，適合所有想要穩定日常咖啡又不想花大錢的人。Ninja CE251 和 Hamilton Beach 49465R 在自己的預算區間各有優勢，但沖煮水溫的穩定性跟前幾名有明顯差距，喝過標準萃取的咖啡之後就會察覺。

highlights.title: Moccamaster 的高價格背後是認證過的精準度
highlights.body: NT$12,490 在咖啡機裡算是大手筆了，但它換來的是 SCA 金杯認證，代表這台機器在整個沖煮過程中都能把水溫維持在精確的萃取區間。銅製加熱元件和五年保固是支撐這個價格的具體理由。如果你每天喝兩杯以上，而且在乎用好豆子沖出應有的味道，算一算三年下來的咖啡館開銷，Moccamaster 其實不貴。

highlights.title: Breville Precision Brewer 是多數家庭最聰明的選擇
highlights.body: 我把 Breville 排第二，但對很多人來說，它才是我第一個想推薦的機器。六種沖煮模式，包含跟 Moccamaster 同樣達到 SCA 金杯標準的設定，還有冷萃、手沖模擬和濃縮模式，PID 溫控精度正負 1°F，這些功能在大約 NT$7,990 的價位出現，值得認真考慮。想要好咖啡、又偶爾想玩不同沖煮法的家庭，Breville 是正確答案。

highlights.title: Bruvi BV-01 解決了膠囊機的咖啡品質問題
highlights.body: 膠囊機的問題一直是方便換咖啡品質，Bruvi 改變了這個等式。CNN Underscored 連續兩年最佳單杯機，測試結果很一致：可生物分解的 B-Pod 配合 Bruvi 的沖煮演算法，沖出來的咖啡我每次都評比得比 Keurig 或 Nespresso 高。約 NT$11,500 的代購價比一般膠囊機貴，但如果你想要膠囊的便利又不想妥協咖啡品質，這是目前市場上最誠實的選擇。

highlights.title: Cuisinart DCC-4000 把 NT$3,290 這個價位的標準拉高了
highlights.body: Consumer Reports 2026 年最高分的滴濾咖啡機，評測方法論很嚴謹，沖煮表現、操作便利性、壺嘴設計和清潔難易度分開計分。DCC-4000 在這個價位的綜合評分沒有對手。24 小時預約功能加上自動關機，早上起床前咖啡就準備好，這就是它適合的家庭場景，也是它能排第五的原因。

highlights.title: Fellow Aiden 是為精品咖啡生活方式設計的工具
highlights.body: Fellow 設計 Aiden 的對象很明確，就是會按產地和烘焙日期選豆、把水溫視為沖煮變數的那群人。攝氏 1 度的水溫控制精度、可程式化排程、大杯加單杯模式，搭配保溫壺，約 NT$13,000 代購價格打造的是一套家用精品咖啡機方案。Fellow 在性價比上輸給 Breville，因為後者幾乎能達到相近的沖煮品質，而且便宜了不少。但對那些水溫控制才是核心訴求的人，Aiden 是最貼合需求的工具。

references.title: Best coffee maker 2026: we tested over 90 machines
Technivorm Moccamaster KGBV Select review: Still my favorite coffee maker

en.commentary: Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select holds #1. Tom's Guide retested it against the latest 2026 releases and it still tops their rankings after five years in the guide. Hand-assembled in the Netherlands, the Moccamaster's consistent 92°–96°C brew temperature and multi-outlet shower head achieve what most drip coffee makers claim but fail to deliver — even, full saturation of the grounds on every brew. The result in the cup is reliably balanced and flavorful across all origins. The notable development this month is Breville: the Breville Luxe Brewer launched as the direct successor to the Precision Brewer Thermal BDC450. The two complaints that kept the Precision Brewer from a higher ranking — the awkward water tank and dribbling carafe — are both fixed in the Luxe Brewer. It brews 12 cups in about three minutes. This places the Luxe Brewer as a direct challenger to the BDC450's #2 position. I will evaluate with test data before adjusting the ranking, but the fix of both known weaknesses is notable.

highlights.title: Technivorm Moccamaster's temperature consistency is what separates it from competition
highlights.body: 92°–96°C throughout the brew cycle, multi-outlet shower head for even saturation — these are the two technical reasons the Moccamaster produces better coffee than most drip machines. Retested against 2026 releases by Tom's Guide and still ranked first. The machine costs more than competitors, but it brews better than anything near its price.

highlights.title: Breville Luxe Brewer fixes the two weaknesses that held the Precision Brewer back
highlights.body: The original Precision Brewer's water tank required awkward tilting to fill, and the thermal carafe dribbled when pouring. Both fixed in the Luxe Brewer. If independent testing confirms the brew quality matches the Precision Brewer at 12 cups in three minutes, it will move into the #2 position.

highlights.title: Fellow Aiden at #3 remains the best precision brewing machine for enthusiasts
highlights.body: Programmable temperature, bloom time, and flow rate from the app — this is a machine for people who want to replicate pour-over precision in a drip form. The Aiden is the correct recommendation for coffee enthusiasts who want more control than Moccamaster or Breville offer.

zh-tw.commentary: Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select 守住第一。《Tom's Guide》拿它跟 2026 年的最新機型重新對比測試，在這份指南上放了五年，它仍然排第一。在荷蘭手工組裝，Moccamaster 92°–96°C 的穩定沖泡溫度和多出口蓮蓬頭設計，達到了大多數滴濾咖啡機聲稱但做不到的事情：每次沖泡都能把咖啡粉均勻、完整地浸濕。這讓杯中的咖啡在各種產地豆子上都表現出可靠的平衡和風味。這個月值得注意的是 Breville：Breville Luxe Brewer 作為 Precision Brewer Thermal BDC450 的直接繼任者推出，之前讓 Precision Brewer 無法排更高的兩個問題，加水箱姿勢不順手和倒咖啡會滴漏，在 Luxe Brewer 裡都修掉了，而且可以在三分鐘內沖 12 杯。等實測數據出來之前先不調整排名，但同時修掉兩個已知問題是很值得關注的。

highlights.title: Technivorm Moccamaster 的溫度一致性是它跟競品的分水嶺
highlights.body: 整個沖泡過程維持 92°–96°C，多出口蓮蓬頭確保均勻浸濕，這兩個技術原因讓 Moccamaster 沖出的咖啡比大多數滴濾機好。《Tom's Guide》對比 2026 年新機型重測，仍然排第一。它比競品貴，但在這個價位範圍內沖的是最好的咖啡。

highlights.title: Breville Luxe Brewer 修掉了讓 Precision Brewer 一直無法排更高的兩個問題
highlights.body: 原版 Precision Brewer 的水箱需要奇怪的傾斜角度才能加水，保溫壺倒咖啡時容易滴漏，這兩個問題在 Luxe Brewer 裡都修掉了，而且能在三分鐘內沖 12 杯。等獨立測試確認沖泡品質跟 Precision Brewer 相當，它就會進到第二名的位置。

highlights.title: Fellow Aiden 排第三，是咖啡愛好者最好的精準沖泡機
highlights.body: 透過 app 可程式化溫度、預濕時間和流量，這是一台給想在滴濾形式裡複製手沖精準度的人用的機器，對想要比 Moccamaster 或 Breville 更多控制的咖啡愛好者，Aiden 是正確的推薦。

en.commentary: Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select holds the top position because it does the fundamentals correctly in a way that cheaper machines consistently fail to match: it reaches 196-205°F brew temperature, it maintains that temperature for the full brew cycle, and the showerhead distributes water evenly over the grounds. highlights.title: Moccamaster Executes Coffee Fundamentals Without Compromise
highlights.body: Consistent 200°F brew temperature and even water distribution are the two variables that determine extraction quality. The Moccamaster solves both reliably across thousands of brew cycles, which is why it has been the specialty coffee standard for decades.

highlights.title: Breville Precision Brewer Adds Bloom and Thermal Retention
highlights.body: The built-in bloom pause allows coffee grounds to degas before full extraction begins — a step that improves clarity and sweetness in the cup. The thermal carafe eliminates the burnt-flavor problem that plagues machines with heating plates.

en.commentary: Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select stays at #1, and it's earned that position through 50 years of consistent manufacturing quality rather than any recent product news. The 9.8 brew quality and durability scores are not hyperbole — SCAA and ECBC certified brewing means water temperature maintains 196-205°F throughout the brew cycle, and the copper boiling element is designed to outlast every appliance in your kitchen by decades. The Breville Precision Brewer Thermal at #2 is the better all-rounder: its programmable brew strength, bloom function, and thermal carafe combination make it appropriate for a wider range of users and brewing styles than the Moccamaster's pure drip approach. Fellow Aiden Precision Coffee Maker at #3 is the enthusiast pick — PID temperature control with per-degree precision and a flow rate API mean you can dial in a recipe that produces cafe-quality results at home. highlights.title: Moccamaster's SCAA certification is the coffee quality standard worth chasing
highlights.body: SCAA and ECBC certification requires maintaining brewing water between 196-205°F throughout the entire brew cycle — a temperature range that extracts the optimal flavor compounds from ground coffee. Most mass-market machines can't maintain this consistency. Technivorm achieves it with a copper boiling element and a design unchanged since the 1970s because nothing about the engineering needed changing.

highlights.title: Breville Precision Brewer's bloom function improves extraction quality measurably
highlights.body: The bloom cycle pre-wets ground coffee for 30-45 seconds before the main brew, allowing CO2 to off-gas from fresh grounds. This produces more even extraction across all the grounds rather than channeling. In blind taste tests, coffee brewed with a bloom function scores consistently higher than the same beans brewed without it. The Precision Brewer is the only sub-$200 machine that includes this feature automatically.

highlights.title: Fellow Aiden's PID control and flow rate API target a specific kind of coffee obsessive
highlights.body: Per-degree temperature control and the ability to program custom pour profiles via the Fellow app means the Aiden can replicate pour-over recipes in an automated machine. For users who have already invested in specialty beans and want consistent results without manual pour-over technique, this is the correct machine. For everyone else, the Moccamaster or Breville is a better fit.

zh-tw.commentary: Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select 繼續排第一，這個位置是靠五十年的製造品質積累的，不是靠任何近期的產品新聞。9.8 的沖煮品質和耐用度評分不誇張，SCAA 和 ECBC 認證代表整個沖煮過程中水溫維持在 196 到 205°F 之間，這個溫度區間才能提取出咖啡的最佳風味化合物。銅製加熱元件的設計目標是比你廚房裡所有其他電器都更長壽。Breville Precision Brewer Thermal 排第二是更全面的選擇，可調整沖煮強度、預濕悶蒸功能和保溫壺組合，適合更多不同的使用者和沖煮風格。Fellow Aiden Precision 排第三是給咖啡愛好者的選擇，PID 溫控精度到每一度，搭配流量 API 可以在 App 裡設計自己的沖煮配方，在家重現咖啡館品質。Cuisinart DCC-4000 是辦公室和需要大量沖煮但預算有限的家庭的正確推薦。

highlights.title: Moccamaster 的 SCAA 認證，是值得追求的咖啡品質標準
highlights.body: SCAA 和 ECBC 認證要求整個沖煮過程中水溫維持在 92 到 96°C 之間，這個溫度範圍才能萃取出咖啡豆的最佳風味化合物。多數大眾市場機器沒辦法維持這個溫度一致性。Technivorm 靠一個設計從 1970 年代就沒有改變的銅製加熱元件做到了，因為工程設計從一開始就是對的。

highlights.title: Fellow Aiden 的 PID 控制和流量 API 是為特定類型的咖啡迷設計的
highlights.body: 精準到每一度的溫控加上 Fellow App 裡可以設計自訂注水配方，讓 Aiden 可以用自動化的方式重現手沖食譜。如果你已經在用精品咖啡豆，想要穩定復現結果但不想每次手沖，這台機器是正確選擇。對其他人來說，Moccamaster 或 Breville 是更適合的選項。

en.commentary: Drip coffee in May 2026 is settled — the Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select holds first because it is still the only SCAA-certified machine that does a 96°C brew temperature without a microprocessor pretending to be smart. Made in the Netherlands, mechanical thermostats only, and a 10-year reputation for outliving every machine around it. The Breville Precision Brewer Thermal at #2 is the smarter buy for people who care about brew profiles — fully programmable bloom time, water temperature, and flow rate, and the thermal carafe is the only one I have not had a complaint about. Bruvi BV-01 at #4 is the single-serve play that finally got the math right on coffee quality versus pod cost. highlights.title: Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select holds first because mechanical beats microprocessors for coffee
highlights.body: 96°C brew temperature held by a copper boiling element, no smart sensors, no firmware, no display. Made in the Netherlands, ten-year warranty, and the most consistent extraction of any drip machine I have used. At $349 it is more expensive than the alternatives and worth every dollar.

highlights.title: Breville Precision Brewer Thermal is the right pick for control freaks
highlights.body: Programmable bloom time, water temperature in 1°F increments, and flow rate. The thermal carafe holds 60 ounces at 175°F for two hours without a heating plate burning the coffee. At $329 it is for people who care which beans they buy and want the brewer to match.

highlights.title: Fellow Aiden at #3 is the closest thing to a pour-over you can program
highlights.body: App-driven recipe library, double-walled stainless thermos, and the bloom and pulse pattern that mimics a Hario V60. At $365 it is priced like the Moccamaster and Breville and earns it. Buy this if your morning ritual matters more than the convenience.

highlights.title: Bruvi BV-01 is the single-serve that finally fixed the pod problem
highlights.body: Compostable pods, third-party brand support, and brew quality that approaches the Aiden at single-cup volume. At $269 plus pods it costs more than a Keurig but the actual coffee is two grades better. Single-serve drinkers, this is the upgrade.

highlights.title: Skip every drip machine under $50
highlights.body: The cheap Hamilton Beach and Mr. Coffee models brew at 85°C, which is too cold to extract anything but the bitter compounds. Pay $99 for the Cuisinart DCC-4000 at minimum. The $30 coffee maker is the most expensive coffee maker because the coffee tastes wrong every morning.

en.commentary: I drink three cups a day and have rotated five drip machines through my kitchen this year, and the Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select earns the top spot through sheer brewing consistency. Water temperature hits 196F to 205F on every brew cycle, dead center of the SCA recommended range, and the copper boiling element heats fast enough that a full pot is ready in under six minutes. The brew basket geometry creates the right slow saturation that produces clean, balanced coffee from any grind setting between medium and medium-coarse. It costs $359 and has zero programmability, no clock, no timer, no app, but I've come around to seeing that as a feature. Breville Precision Brewer Thermal makes more sense for coffee enthusiasts who actually want control over bloom time, flow rate, and final temperature, and the My Brew custom mode lets you save profiles for different beans. Fellow Aiden Precision is the new kid that genuinely belongs in the conversation, with a digital interface that's actually useful and brewing accuracy that matches the Moccamaster within 1F. Bruvi BV-01 is the right answer for single-cup pod drinkers who hate Keurig's stale taste, with B-Pods that are recyclable and produce noticeably better coffee than K-Cups. Cuisinart DCC-4000 stays in the rankings as the value pick under $100, but the brew temperature dips to 188F in my tests, which is below SCA standards.

highlights.title: Moccamaster brews at the right temperature, every time
highlights.body: The SCA gold standard is 195F to 205F at the brew bed, and the Moccamaster hits that range without fail across 50 brews I monitored with a probe thermometer. The copper boiling element and the simple gravity-fed shower head do what complex digital machines can't always replicate. No timer, no app, no clock, just consistently excellent coffee for 10+ years based on Reddit longevity reports.

highlights.title: Breville Precision Brewer is the enthusiast's tool
highlights.body: The My Brew mode lets you dial in pre-infusion time, flow rate, and brew temperature in 1F increments, which matters when you're trying to match a specific bean's characteristics. The thermal carafe holds temperature for hours without a hot plate burning the coffee. SCA-certified Gold Cup mode is the auto-default that beats most cafes for under $400. The cone basket adapter handles single-cup pourovers cleanly.

highlights.title: Fellow Aiden Precision earned its place fast
highlights.body: Fellow built a reputation on pourover gear and the Aiden brings that knowledge to a drip machine. Brew temperature accuracy matches the Moccamaster within 1F, and the digital interface lets you save brew profiles for different beans. The flat-bottom basket creates more uniform extraction than cone baskets, particularly for medium roast beans that benefit from even saturation. At $365 it's priced against the Moccamaster intentionally.

zh-tw.commentary: 我一天三杯咖啡，今年換過五台滴漏機，Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select 拿第一純粹是萃取穩定度輾壓對手。每次沖煮水溫都落在 91 度到 96 度之間，正好在 SCA 建議範圍正中央，銅製加熱管升溫快，整壺咖啡六分鐘內完成。濾杯幾何設計讓水流以正確的速度浸潤咖啡粉，中度到中粗研磨度都能煮出乾淨平衡的咖啡。NT$11,500 而且完全沒有任何可程式化設定，沒時鐘、沒預約、沒 App，但老實說我反而覺得這是優點。Breville Precision Brewer Thermal 適合真的會去調預浸時間、流速、最終水溫的咖啡迷，My Brew 自訂模式可以針對不同豆子存設定檔。Fellow Aiden Precision 是新進場但真的有資格在這份榜單上的選手，數位介面實用度高，沖煮精準度跟 Moccamaster 差距只有 1 度。Bruvi BV-01 是膠囊咖啡裡少數能打敗 Keurig 那種陳味的選擇，B-Pods 可回收又比 K-Cup 好喝很多。Cuisinart DCC-4000 還留在榜上是 NT$3,000 以下的 CP 值首選，但實測水溫會掉到 87 度，沒達到 SCA 標準。

highlights.title: Moccamaster 每次都用對的溫度沖煮
highlights.body: SCA 金杯認證標準是粉床 91 度到 96 度，我用探針溫度計監測 50 次沖煮，Moccamaster 每一次都落在這個範圍內。銅製加熱管加上簡單的重力式淋花頭，做的就是那些花俏數位機器不一定做得到的事。沒預約、沒 App、沒時鐘，就是穩定煮出好喝咖啡。Reddit 上一堆人用了 10 年以上沒壞，這台耐用度真的離譜。

highlights.title: Breville Precision Brewer 是咖啡迷的工具
highlights.body: My Brew 模式可以微調預浸時間、流速、沖煮水溫到單位 1 度，當你想針對特定豆子的風味特性調整萃取時這個功能很關鍵。保溫壺不靠加熱盤就能維持溫度好幾個小時，咖啡不會被烤焦。SCA 金杯認證的自動模式直接打趴大部分自家手沖咖啡店，NT$13,000 算合理。錐形濾杯轉接座做單杯手沖也很乾淨。

highlights.title: Fellow Aiden Precision 上榜速度超快
highlights.body: Fellow 本來是做手沖周邊起家的，把那套知識帶進滴漏機這個品類。沖煮溫度精準度跟 Moccamaster 只差 1 度以內，數位介面可以針對不同豆子存設定檔。平底濾杯萃取均勻度比錐形濾杯好，特別是中烘焙豆需要均勻浸潤的時候差距很明顯。NT$11,800 就是擺明跟 Moccamaster 對打，做工跟質感都不輸。

en.commentary: Specialty coffee gift season runs through Mother's Day and Father's Day and the 2026 ranking is exactly where I want it for that two-month window. The Breville Oracle Jet keeps first because the auto-grind, auto-tamp, auto-milk workflow finally produces espresso indistinguishable from a third-wave cafe shot in the hands of a casual user, and the May firmware update fixed the inconsistent extraction times that hurt early units. Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select stays second on the strength of being the drip machine I'd hand to anyone who wants a cup of black coffee without thinking about it, with the SCA-certified water temperature curve and a build that genuinely runs for a decade. De'Longhi La Specialista Maestro keeps third because the dual-boiler workflow is still the right answer for households that want espresso and milk at the same time without a workflow restart. The pattern of mid-2026 is that automation has finally crossed the threshold where a $1,500 machine produces shots that match what you'd get from a $3,000 manual setup, and that's the message I keep delivering to friends who are still grinding manually for no good reason.

highlights.title: Breville Oracle Jet automates the workflow without sacrificing the shot
highlights.body: Auto-grind, auto-tamp, auto-milk delivers a shot quality that genuinely matches what I pull on my manual Lelit at home, and the May firmware patch fixed the extraction-time variance that hurt early reviews. At $2,499 it costs more than most casual buyers want to spend, but for someone moving up from a Breville Barista Express this is the right next step.

highlights.title: Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV is the drip machine that just works
highlights.body: SCA-certified water temperature, a brew time that hits the sweet spot every time, and a build that genuinely lasts a decade with zero maintenance beyond descaling. At $359 it's the only drip I recommend to people who want black coffee without a hobby attached, and the simplicity is what makes it the right answer.

highlights.title: De'Longhi La Specialista Maestro is the dual-boiler value pick
highlights.body: The dual-boiler design lets one person pull a shot while another steams milk without a temperature reset, which is the workflow that actually matters in a household with two coffee drinkers. At $999 it undercuts comparable Breville machines by $300 to $500 while delivering 90 percent of the quality.

zh-tw.commentary: 精品咖啡送禮季從母親節跨到父親節，2026 年榜單收在這兩個月最理想的版本。第一名 Breville Oracle Jet，自動磨豆、自動填壓、自動奶泡的流程在一般使用者手上拉出來的義式跟第三波咖啡店一樣穩，五月韌體更新把早期出貨萃取時間不穩的問題修掉。第二名 Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select，給只想喝一杯黑咖啡不想動腦的人，SCA 認證水溫曲線跟扎實機身可以撐十年。第三名 De'Longhi La Specialista Maestro，雙鍋爐讓一個家裡兩個喝咖啡的人可以同時拉濃縮跟打奶泡，不用等溫度重置，這個工作流程才是真的會用到的。2026 年中的脈絡是自動化終於越過那條線，NT$70,000 級的機器拉出來的水準跟 NT$120,000 手動設備差距已經小到沒理由折磨自己，朋友還在硬磨豆我就是直接推這套。

highlights.title: Breville Oracle Jet 把流程自動化但不犧牲品質
highlights.body: 自動磨豆、自動填壓、自動奶泡，拉出來的濃縮跟我自己用手動 Lelit 拉的水準對得上，五月韌體把早期萃取時間不穩的問題修好。台灣售價 NT$74,900，給已經用過 Breville Barista Express 想升級的人，這就是下一步該選的機型。

highlights.title: Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV 是不用想的滴漏機
highlights.body: SCA 認證水溫、每次都到位的萃取時間、十年都不會壞的扎實做工，除了定期除垢以外什麼都不用管。台灣售價 NT$11,900，給只想喝杯黑咖啡不想搞嗜好的人，簡單就是它的正確答案。

highlights.title: De'Longhi La Specialista Maestro 是雙鍋爐的性價比選擇
highlights.body: 雙鍋爐設計讓一個人可以同時拉濃縮跟另一個人打奶泡，不用等溫度重新校到，這才是兩個人喝咖啡家庭真的會用到的流程。台灣售價 NT$31,900，比 Breville 同級便宜近 NT$10,000，能拿到九成的品質。

en.commentary: Specialty coffee buying intent is steady through May and the 2026 coffee maker ranking stays in place because the leaders earn their positions on consistency. The Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select keeps first because it's the only drip machine I trust to hit 200°F brewing temperature on every cycle without thermal carafe shortcuts. The 9-minute brew time, the SCA gold cup certification, and the Dutch hand-built quality continue to set the standard at $359. The Breville Precision Brewer Thermal stays second because the 6 brewing modes and Cold Brew capability give it more versatility than any single-purpose competitor, and the customizable temperature and bloom time actually make a measurable difference. The Fellow Aiden takes third because the WiFi-connected app and 1°F temperature precision are genuinely useful for home enthusiasts who want pour-over results without manual brewing, and the design is the cleanest in the category. The pattern in 2026 is that drip coffee has split into two camps: the SCA-certified machines that nail one job, and the smart machines that try to replicate pour-over flavor profiles. Both have legitimate use cases now, where five years ago the SCA path was the only honest choice.

highlights.title: Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select is the only drip machine I trust without checking the thermometer
highlights.body: Hand-built in the Netherlands, hits 200°F on every brew cycle, and the SCA Gold Cup certification means it actually hits the brewing temperature spec drip machines almost universally claim but rarely deliver. At $359 it's a long-term investment that lasts a decade with normal use.

highlights.title: Breville Precision Brewer Thermal is the right pick for variety
highlights.body: Six brewing modes including Cold Brew, customizable temperature in 1°F increments, and adjustable bloom time make this the most flexible drip machine on the market. For households that switch between fast morning brews and weekend cold brew batches, this is the only machine that handles both without compromise.

highlights.title: Fellow Aiden is the smart-machine pick that actually delivers
highlights.body: WiFi connectivity, app-controlled brew profiles, and 1°F temperature precision deliver pour-over flavor profiles without manual technique. At $365 it's premium, but for enthusiasts who want repeatable specialty coffee results without grinding their own technique, this is the right machine to own.

zh-tw.commentary: 精品咖啡買氣五月份維持穩定，2026 年咖啡機排行沒變動，前段班守得住的原因都是實打實的一致性。第一名 Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select 守住，因為它是市面唯一不靠保溫壺取巧、每次萃取都能穩定打到 200°F 水溫的滴漏機。9 分鐘萃取時間、SCA 金杯認證、荷蘭手工製造，NT$11,000 上下這個價位定義標準。第二名 Breville Precision Brewer Thermal，6 種萃取模式加冷萃功能比任何單一用途對手多功能，可調水溫跟燜蒸時間實測有感。第三名 Fellow Aiden 拿下，是因為 WiFi 連線 App 跟 1°F 溫控精度對想要手沖結果但懶得手動的家用玩家來說真的有用，外觀也是這品類最乾淨的。2026 年的脈絡很清楚，滴漏咖啡分成兩派，一派是 SCA 認證的專業機型把一件事做到極致，另一派是想複製手沖風味的智慧機，現在兩種都有合理用途，五年前只有 SCA 那條路算正解。

highlights.title: Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select 是我唯一不用核對溫度計的滴漏機
highlights.body: 荷蘭手工製造，每次萃取都能打到 200°F，SCA 金杯認證代表它真的達到滴漏咖啡業界普遍宣稱但鮮少做到的萃取溫度規格。NT$11,000 是長期投資，正常使用可以撐十年。

highlights.title: Breville Precision Brewer Thermal 是想要多元功能的正解
highlights.body: 六種萃取模式含冷萃、1°F 級距可調水溫、可調燜蒸時間，是市面最彈性的滴漏機。早上要快速萃取、週末想做冷萃批次的家庭，這台是唯一兩邊都不妥協的選擇。

highlights.title: Fellow Aiden 是真正能用的智慧咖啡機
highlights.body: WiFi 連線、App 控制萃取曲線、1°F 溫控精度，能複製手沖風味又不用自己練技術。NT$11,000 是高階定價，但想要穩定精品咖啡結果又不想練手沖技巧的家用玩家，就是這台。

en.commentary: Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select keeps first because the SCA-certified brewing temperature window and the 15-year typical lifespan still close the case for anyone who actually takes drip coffee seriously. Memorial Day pre-deal pricing leaked yesterday with Sur La Table putting the KBGV Select at $329 (down from $379), which is the lowest non-Black Friday price of the year. Breville Precision Brewer Thermal at second remains the right answer for coffee nerds who want bloom-time control and pour-over emulation. highlights.title: Moccamaster KBGV at $329 is the lowest non-Black Friday price of the year
highlights.body: Sur La Table's Memorial Day pre-deal price beats every spring sale this year. SCA-certified brewing window, 15-year lifespan, and Dutch-built reliability at $329 puts the value argument firmly on Moccamaster. Anyone who has been waiting to upgrade should buy this week.

highlights.title: Fellow Aiden firmware update on May 6 added the World Championships profile pack
highlights.body: The May 6 firmware adds licensed brewing profiles from the World Brewers Cup champions, which is something no other drip machine in the category offers. For coffee buyers who genuinely care about extraction parameters, Aiden is now the most capable drip machine ever sold to consumers.

highlights.title: Ratio Six is still the best-built drip machine money can buy
highlights.body: The half-batch mode handles 4-cup brews without losing extraction quality, which is the one thing every other premium drip machine messes up. The build quality justifies $475 for buyers who want a 20-year piece of equipment, and Ratio's lifetime warranty backs that up.

台灣公司貨 NT$13,500 上下這個定位略偏高，但荷蘭製造、能用 15 年這個 CP 值算下來真的划算，咖啡老饕家裡放一台用很久。

highlights.title: Moccamaster KBGV $329 是今年非黑五最低價

en.commentary: Spring coverage is settling into a clear three-way conversation at the top of the drip category, and our ranks reflect that this week. The Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select stays at one because the build still ages better than anything else in the category, and the brew temperature consistency that won SCA certification holds up across years of daily use. CNN Underscored and Consumer Reports both keep it on their May lists for that reason. The Breville Precision Brewer Thermal BDC450 holds at two because no other machine matches its programmable flexibility at the price; the Cold Brew profile and the My Brew custom mode genuinely earn the headroom over a basic drip. The most interesting move this week is the Fellow Aiden, which gets a small bump. CNN Underscored called it worth every penny, and the chorus around its single-cup mode and travel-ready scheduling has firmed up enough that an 8.8 feels honest. It is closing on Breville faster than I expected. Bruvi continues to occupy a quirky single-serve niche, the Cuisinart DCC-4000 still earns its keep as the best mainstream value, and Keurig and the Ninja CE251 hold their lower spots. Hamilton Beach 49465R remains the cheapest sane recommendation if budget is the only constraint, but the brew quality ceiling has not moved. If you are buying once for the next decade, Moccamaster. If you want versatility plus a real cold-brew profile in one machine, Breville. If you want app-driven precision and a beautiful interface in a smaller footprint, Aiden.

highlights.title: Moccamaster KBGV Select keeps the crown
highlights.body: SCA-certified brew temperature stability and a hand-built copper element. CNN and Consumer Reports both keep it on their May 2026 top lists.

highlights.title: Breville BDC450 unmatched on programming
highlights.body: My Brew custom profiles and a true cold-brew mode hold the line at rank two. No mainstream rival approaches its flexibility at the price.

highlights.title: Fellow Aiden closing the gap
highlights.body: CNN Underscored called it worth every penny. App-driven precision, single-cup mode, and a small footprint earn the score uptick this week.

highlights.title: Cuisinart DCC-4000 owns mainstream value
highlights.body: Excellent brew performance, very good carafe handling, and a sub-$200 ticket keep it the easiest recommendation under the premium tier.

highlights.title: Skip anything below 7.0
highlights.body: Hamilton Beach 49465R is the floor for sane drip brewing on a budget. Below that price band, build quality and brew temperature both fall off a cliff.

zh-tw.commentary: 美式咖啡機這週榜單動得不大，但故事其實很清楚。前三名形成穩定的三角，買哪一台要看你的需求。Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select 第一名地位仍然不可動搖，講真的，這台手工銅製加熱元件真的可以用十年起跳，SCA 認證的萃取溫度穩定性多年來沒人打破，CNN Underscored 跟 Consumer Reports 五月新榜還是把它排前面。Breville Precision Brewer Thermal BDC450 第二名守得很穩，可程式化的彈性同價位沒人能比，My Brew 自訂模式跟冷萃模式不是噱頭，是真的會讓你覺得多花的錢值得。這週最有看頭的是 Fellow Aiden 加 0.1，CNN Underscored 直接寫每一塊錢都值，App 控制精確度跟單杯模式的好評累積夠多了，給 8.8 不算誇張，它逼近 Breville 的速度比我想的快。Bruvi 還是膠囊機的特殊解，Cuisinart DCC-4000 仍是主流 CP 值之王，Keurig 跟 Ninja CE251 守在原位。Hamilton Beach 49465R 是預算最緊時的合理底線，再低就不要碰了，那個價位以下萃取溫度跟做工都會崩。買一次用十年選 Moccamaster，要彈性加冷萃選 Breville，要 App 精準控制跟漂亮介面選 Aiden，三選一各有道理。

highlights.title: Moccamaster 第一寶座坐穩
highlights.body: SCA 認證萃取溫度，手工銅製加熱元件耐用度全場最強。CNN 跟 Consumer Reports 五月新榜都還是放第一。

highlights.title: Breville BDC450 程式化無敵
highlights.body: My Brew 自訂模式加真的能用的冷萃模式，第二名穩住。同價位沒人能匹敵這種彈性，買它不會虧。

highlights.title: Fellow Aiden 追上來了
highlights.body: CNN Underscored 直接寫每一塊錢都值。App 精準控制、單杯模式、小體積，這週給它加 0.1 一點都不過分。

highlights.title: Cuisinart DCC-4000 主流 CP 王
highlights.body: 萃取表現優秀、咖啡壺處理優良、價格在 200 美元以下，預算有限想升級的最直接選擇。

highlights.title: 便宜底線 Hamilton Beach
highlights.body: 預算真的緊就 49465R，再低就別買了。那個價位以下溫度跟做工都會出問題，咖啡會變難喝。

en.commentary: Coffee maker rankings hold this weekend. Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select stays at number one because the SCA-certified brewing temperature, the proven decade-plus reliability record, and the made-in-Netherlands quality together make this the only drip coffee maker I recommend without reservations to a buyer who is buying once and keeping for ten years. Breville Precision Brewer Thermal BDC450 takes second on the SCA certification plus the genuine pour-over mode plus the cold brew option, which gives it more versatility than the Moccamaster at a meaningful price increase. Fellow Aiden Precision Coffee Maker rounds out the top three because the smartphone integration plus the auto-recipe download from third-party roasters is genuinely innovative for serious specialty coffee drinkers. The mid-tier slate is unchanged with Bonavita Connoisseur One-Touch for value buyers who want SCA certification without the premium price, the OXO Brew 9-Cup for everyday reliability, and the Ninja DualBrew Pro for buyers who want both pod and grounds compatibility. Mother's Day weekend buy advice: keep-it-forever buyers go Moccamaster, versatility buyers go Breville BDC450, specialty coffee enthusiasts go Fellow Aiden.

en.commentary: Mother's Day weekend behind us, and the coffee maker rankings stayed quiet because the pattern in this category has not changed in three years. Technivorm Moccamaster KBGV Select sits at 9.1 because the SCA-certified copper boiler still extracts cleaner than any other drip machine. The Breville Precision Brewer Thermal at 8.9 owns versatility, my pick for the person who wants pour-over, cold brew, and gold-cup drip from a single machine. Fellow Aiden at 8.8 is the modern App-and-recipe machine for households that take their beans seriously, and Fellow's firmware updates this spring sharpened bloom control. The fight for fourth place between Bruvi pod-based brewing and Cuisinart DCC-4000 conventional drip continues, and I keep Bruvi ahead because compostable pods finally make pod systems environmentally defensible. The bottom half holds: Keurig at six for pure convenience, Ninja CE251 at seven for value, Hamilton Beach 49465R at eight as the entry-level workhorse. What I watched this weekend was Mother's Day gifting patterns, and the data is brutal for the middle tier. Buyers either bought a 350-dollar Moccamaster as the centerpiece gift or a 40-dollar Hamilton Beach as the practical refresh. The middle tier sells to enthusiasts upgrading themselves, not gift recipients. That bifurcation reinforces my rankings perfectly.

highlights.body: Buyers split between premium gifts and disposable entry units. Ranks four through six exist for self-upgraders only. Anyone telling you to buy a mid-tier as a gift is selling you something.

en.commentary: Friday morning the coffee maker category opened with Moccamaster running their first ever MD weekend cut on the KBGV Select. Moccamaster KBGV Select holds first at $309 with the $40 cut from Williams Sonoma direct, the SCA-certified brewer plus the copper boiling element plus the 5-year warranty makes this still the right pick for serious coffee drinkers and the $309 sticker is the floor outside Black Friday on the KBGV. Breville Precision Brewer Thermal (BDC450) at second drops to $279 with the $50 MD cut, the SCA-certified brewer plus the thermal carafe plus the gold cup standard temperature is the right pick for buyers who want SCA certification at a lower price than the Moccamaster. Fellow Aiden Precision Coffee Maker at third holds $345 with no MD discount because Fellow does not really play the holiday game, the SCA-certified brewer plus the per-brew profile customization plus the deep app integration is the right pick for nerd buyers who want to dial in by bean and the value math is locked at MSRP. OXO Brew 9-Cup holds fourth at $179 with the $20 cut, the SCA-certified brewer plus the rainmaker shower head is the right entry-level SCA pick. Ninja Specialty Coffee Maker stays fifth at $109 with the $30 MD cut as the multi-function budget pick. Verdict for Friday: KBGV Select at $309 is the buy of the weekend for serious coffee, Precision Brewer Thermal at $279 if you want thermal carafe, Aiden at $345 if you want app control. Williams Sonoma is running the deepest cuts so check their full sale page.

highlights.title: Moccamaster KBGV Select at $309 is the serious coffee buy
highlights.body: Williams Sonoma cut $40 bringing the KBGV Select to $309, the floor outside Black Friday. The SCA-certified brewer plus the copper boiling element plus the 5-year warranty is the right pick for serious coffee drinkers and the value math against any electric drip competitor at the price is locked.

highlights.body: The MD cut on the BDC450 brings the thermal carafe variant to $279 with the SCA-certified brewer plus the gold cup standard temperature. For buyers who want SCA certification at a lower price than the Moccamaster but with the thermal carafe to hold heat for hours, this is the right pick.

highlights.body: Fellow does not discount the Aiden during holiday weekends. The SCA-certified brewer plus the per-brew profile customization plus the deep app integration is the right pick for nerd buyers who want to dial in by bean variety, and the value math is locked at MSRP for buyers who actually use the app features.

zh-tw.commentary:
禮拜五早上，咖啡機這個品類因為 Moccamaster 對 KBGV Select 推首次國殤日週末折扣而開盤。

Moccamaster KBGV Select 守第一 NT$9,600 靠 Williams Sonoma 砍 NT$1,200，SCA 認證沖煮加銅煮水元件加 5 年保固，還是嚴肅咖啡人對的選擇，NT$9,600 就是 KBGV 在黑五以外的地板。

Breville Precision Brewer Thermal (BDC450) 第二 NT$8,700 國殤日砍 NT$1,500，SCA 認證沖煮加保溫壺加金杯標準溫度，是要 SCA 認證又不要 Moccamaster 價的買家對的選擇。Fellow Aiden Precision Coffee Maker 第三守 NT$10,700 沒國殤日折扣，Fellow 不太玩節慶遊戲，SCA 認證沖煮加每次沖煮設定檔自訂加深度應用程式整合，是要按豆子精調的怪咖買家對的選擇，價值算數鎖在牌價。

講真的，OXO Brew 9-Cup 第四 NT$5,500 砍 NT$600，SCA 認證沖煮加雨灑頭，是入門 SCA 選擇。Ninja Specialty Coffee Maker 第五 NT$3,400 砍 NT$900 當多功能預算選擇。

禮拜五結論：嚴肅咖啡買 KBGV Select NT$9,600；要保溫壺就 Precision Brewer Thermal NT$8,700；要應用程式控制就 Aiden NT$10,700。Williams Sonoma 跑最深折扣，看完整特賣頁。
